title: Get Results
description: Retrieve scraped LinkedIn post engagement data from your squid

emailFields.title: Email Enrichment Fields
emailFields.content: These fields are only populated when email enrichment is enabled.

fields.description: Email validation status: valid, invalid, catch-all, unknown
URL of the post they engaged with
Whether the user commented on the post
The user's comment text (if they commented)
fields.example: "This is a great post! Thanks for sharing."

fields.description: Whether the user reacted to the post
Type of reaction: LIKE, CELEBRATE, LOVE, INSIGHTFUL, CURIOUS

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 10, max: 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

proTips.content: Filter by `has_commented: true` to focus on users who engaged deeply with the content.
A user may appear once with both comment and reaction data if they did both.
Use `reaction_type` to identify enthusiastic supporters (CELEBRATE, LOVE) vs casual engagement (LIKE).

seo.title: Get Results - LinkedIn Posts Commenters and Likers Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to retrieve LinkedIn post commenters and likers data using the lobstr.io API.

subcategory: LinkedIn Posts Commenters and Likers Scraper
